evals.name: new-patterns-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all new shadcn rules

assertions.trap: Modifying shadcn source directly for custom variants
assertions.description: Wrap base component for custom variants -- never modify shadcn source
ThemeProvider for dark mode -- toggles .dark class, stores in localStorage

assertions.trap: Raw colors (green-500) instead of semantic tokens
assertions.description: name/name-foreground pairing -- base for bg, -foreground for text
@theme inline required in v4 -- without it custom props may not generate utilities
